TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Kanakanavu, story: kkvNr_sowing_Kuatu

S.FORM: aranai kia mia tati’ingi pa ’una ci kia manu.
S.TRANSL: 自從我年紀還很小的時候，我就有了小孩。
I’ve had a child since I was still young.

S.FORM: te kia cumacancu te kia manan cumacancu sii ’ekia nimava manu noo cumacancu kia mangucun ia tia matapari’i ha manu aranai kukuca.
S.TRANSL: (如果)我要插秧，我要怎麼插秧呢？因為我已經在背著小孩，當我插秧已經完成一段的時候，小孩子會從我的背上滑落下來。

(If) I was to transplant some rice seedlings, how should I do it? Since I was already carrying the child on my back, when I finished one part of the whole transplanting process, the child would fall from my back.

S.FORM: uh makasua kia mamia uh cumacancu uh avʉʉn ha manu.
S.TRANSL: 我也只能那樣，插著秧，小孩背著。
I could only do it like that, transplanting the rice seedlings and carrying the child.

S.FORM: ah nuu matirupangi ci cumacancu ia te cu u’umʉʉn ngai makasua kangvang avʉʉn manu mo’uma canaa sii ’una cʉn.
S.TRANSL: 完成插秧之後，就要除草了，也是那樣要背著小孩做稻田的工作，因為會有（對稻米有害的）雜草。

When the whole transplanting process was finished, it would be time for the weeding process, which was also done like that, with the child being carried during the work in the field, because there would be weeds (which are harmful to the rice).

S.FORM: nuu tatia ci ha uh cinancua pusiam ia te ci kia mecara nuu ’una ci macu’u ia tia kʉnʉn uh tapinange.
S.TRANSL: 當所插秧的稻米已經長大，我就要去照顧。如果已經有了果實，會被小鳥吃掉。
When the rice that had been transplanted had already grown up, I would take care of it. If there were already some fruits, the birds would eat them.

S.FORM: ah nuu nuu totasiarʉ ia makacaang kia aramia’ʉ mucʉmcʉm kia moha ‘inia meecara sii tia kUnUn tapinange hau pusiam.
S.TRANSL: 當早晨的時候，我會很迅速的起床，趕著去那裡照顧，因為稻米會被小鳥吃掉。
In the morning, I would get up quickly and hurry to go there (the rice field) to take care of it because the rice would be eaten by the birds.

S.FORM: ah nuu makasua cu apatarava nuu tanavikarʉ ci ha pusiam ia te ci kia maripusiam.
S.TRANSL: 如果稻米已經那樣了（結了果實），已經到了變黃的階段，我就要收割稻米。
If the rice had become like that (had already grown some fruit), and had become yellow, I would then reap the rice.

S.FORM: kee uh marivici kia cau nuu maripusiam kia sii tassa mamia.
S.TRANSL: 當割稻的時候，我會帶別人來，因為只有(我們夫婦)兩位在(田地)工作。
I would bring some other people when I reap the rice because there would only be two of us (working in the field).

S.FORM: ‘an tia mara’an putukikio nuu tassa mamia kia putukikio.
S.TRANSL: 只有(夫妻倆)兩位工作的話，我們兩個工作就不會很快。
(We) could not work fast if there is only two of us working.

S.FORM: uh nuu matirupangʉ ci maripusiam ia pariin cu pusiam.
S.TRANSL: 若收割已經結束了的話，就要曬稻米了。
If the reaping process had been finished, it would be time for the rice to be dried in the sun.

S.FORM: mon kia pipining ʉ apari ha pusiam.
S.TRANSL: 我就在房屋外的廣場，曬乾稻米。
I would be outside on the flat ground, drying the rice.

S.FORM: apaco’e nuu macici in taniarʉ ia ’ehi kia pipiniing kamanʉng pusiam mari ʉ marivuvuarʉ ha pusiam sii tia pariin.
S.TRANSL: 不論太陽多熱，我還是在外面處理稻米，不斷地翻攪，因為要曬乾。
No matter how hot the weather was, I would still be outside dealing with the rice, and keep stirring it because it was going to be dried.

S.FORM: ah nuu maringuna ci ha pusiam ia te cu ʉsʉ’ʉn na poti tia a’unʉn musʉ tanasa.
S.TRANSL: 若稻米已經曬乾了，我就要放置到布袋中，是我要背回去收藏在家屋裡的。
If the rice has already been dried, I would put it into a sack, which would be carried and put in the house.

S.FORM: ’una kia tasʉ’a na tanasa nikamanʉnga tia tasʉ’a pusiam.
S.TRANSL: 我在家屋裡有一個收藏的地方，是做來收藏稻米的地方。
I have a place for storage in the house, which was made to be a storage place for rice.

S.FORM: ʉng makasua cu tasange ci kia.
S.TRANSL: 就那樣子，我就休息了。
That’ll be it. I would then take a rest.
就只有那樣了。
That’s all.
